requirement_results.description: GIVEN a real curated_routes payload shape (compositeScore 0.81, 5 dimensions 0-1) passed as props WHEN ScoreDimensionBarSection renders THEN each bar fill == Math.round(score*100)% and headline == '81/100'.
key_assertions_verified: track backgroundColor == '#F2EFED' (semantic.color.secondary.default — inset-substitute; surface.inset token absent)
section renders null when ALL scores AND compositeScore are null/undefined
section renders available rows when only SOME dimensions null (partial nullity handled)

requirement_results.unit_test_justified: Pure closed-form integer-rounding function — no network, no DB, no render, no side effects. Integration harness adds no signal at the boundaries.
requirement_results.description: GIVEN scoreToPercent WHEN invoked at boundaries THEN 0->0, 0.5->50, 0.745->75, 1->100, null->OMIT_SENTINEL.

red_evidence.summary: Both test suites failed to load with 'Failed to resolve import ../score-dimension-bar' — true RED because the component did not exist yet.

verification_gates.seeded_evidence_note: AC-1 is a pure-presentational component test driven entirely by props (no Convex). The 'seed' is the canonical getCuratedRouteDetail payload shape {compositeScore:0.81, dimensions:[{key:'curvature',label:'Curvature',score:0.62},{key:'scenic',label:'Scenic',score:0.74},{key:'technical',label:'Technical',score:0.55},{key:'traffic',label:'Traffic',score:0.30},{key:'remoteness',label:'Remoteness',score:0.88}]} passed as props. The component never imports Convex, so no live-dev requirement applies; the task contract explicitly states this is the one task with NO env caveat.

token_assumptions.reason: Token ABSENT in tokens/semantic/semantic.tokens.json. components/ui/progress.tsx (sibling primitive) uses secondary.default as its track — Rule of 2 satisfied.

constraints_honored: Pure presentational: props in, JSX out. NO useQuery / Convex hooks.
Fill width ALWAYS derived from Math.round(score*100)% — never hard-coded.
Accepts ordered `dimensions` array prop — no hard-coded score-key switch.
testID per row: score-bar-{key}; headline: score-composite-headline; fill: score-bar-{key}-fill; track: score-bar-{key}-track.
Row minHeight 44 (future tap affordance — no reflow).
Null-omission: section returns null when compositeScore AND every dimension score are null/undefined; individual null dimensions are filtered from the rendered rows.
